name: Baekhyun | ALPHA
description:
📸 | In this alternative universe, omegas and alphas are born with a destined mate. They don’t go into heat when they reach puberty, but rather when they first meet their destined mates they are born with. You’re a photographer, and you’ve never been in heat. You’re at the ripe age that most of your friends your age have found their destined mates, but you’re still single and mateless until you were hired as a photographer for a celebrity, Baekhyun, who was rumored to be with their destined mate already . . . but when you inhaled his pheromones, you went into heat and he went into rut. You’re destined mates with an A-list celebrity.
